contracts.project: FY 2022 Master Plan Study Updates (Kirby and Fish Creeks and West Fork Trinity River Geomorphology and Erosion Studies)
contracts.notes: Professional services contract for geomorphology and erosion studies of Kirby Creek, Fish Creek, and West Fork Trinity River as part of master plan updates.

contracts.project: 2023 Annual Study for Outfall Rehabilitation
contracts.notes: Professional services contract for the 2023 annual study of storm drainage outfall rehabilitation.

contracts.project: Erosion mitigation of bridges located at Pollock Place, Roy Orr Boulevard & Trinity Boulevard
contracts.limits: Pollock Place, Roy Orr Boulevard & Trinity Boulevard
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services contract for erosion mitigation design at three bridge locations.

contracts.project: Jefferson Street widening from four-lanes to six-lanes from SW 23rd Street to Great Southwest Parkway
contracts.limits: Jefferson Street from SW 23rd Street to Great Southwest Parkway
contracts.notes: Professional services contract for engineering design services for the widening of Jefferson Street from four lanes to six lanes.

contracts.project: Grand Prairie Flood Warning and Forecasting System - Phase 4
contracts.notes: Professional services contract to begin and complete Phase 4 of the Grand Prairie Flood Warning and Forecasting System.

contracts.project: FY 2022 Master Plan Study Updates (Kirby and Fish Creeks and West Fork Trinity River Geomorphology and Erosion Studies)
contracts.notes: Professional services for geomorphology and erosion studies of Kirby Creek, Fish Creek, and West Fork Trinity River, including contingency.

contracts.project: Davis Road Realignment - Phase 1
contracts.limits: Davis Road from south of SH 360 past Old Davis Road
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services for design, surveying, utility coordination, bidding, and construction administration for Davis Road realignment paving and drainage improvements, including landscaping and irrigation design.

contracts.project: Densman Health Clinic Rehabilitation
contracts.notes: Architectural, Interior Design, and Engineering Services for the rehabilitation of the Densman Health Clinic, including 5% contingency.

contracts.project: Densman Health Clinic Renovations
contracts.notes: Architectural, Interior Design, and Engineering Services for the renovation and rehabilitation of the Densman Health Clinic, including site visits, schematic design, construction documents, bidding assistance, and construction administration.

contracts.project: Pioneer Parkway Improvements
contracts.notes: Professional services contract to prepare 30% Schematic Design Plans for Pioneer Parkway Improvements project.

contracts.project: Pioneer Parkway Improvements - 30% Schematic Design Plans
contracts.limits: Great Southwest Parkway to east of Belt Line (FM1382)
contracts.notes: Professional services contract to prepare 30% schematic design plans for Pioneer Parkway improvements including multi-modal hike and bike trail on the northern side and concrete sidewalk on the southern side as part of the Pioneer Parkway 'International Corridor' Urban Design Strategy Plan.

contracts.project: Pioneer Parkway Streetscape & Trail Improvements
contracts.limits: approximately 4.2 miles from Great Southwest Parkway to Mountain Creek Lake
contracts.notes: Civil engineering, surveying, and design services for multi-modal hike and bike trail and concrete sidewalk improvements along Pioneer Parkway, including 30% schematic design, topographic survey, right-of-way mapping, and sub-surface utility engineering.

contracts.project: Pioneer Parkway Streetscape & Trail Improvements - Urban Design
contracts.notes: Landscape architecture and urban design services for Pioneer Parkway improvements, including schematic design of street frontage, pedestrian amenities, urban design monuments, wayfinding signage, and catalyst intersection designs.

contracts.project: Economic Development Services - As-Needed Professional Services
contracts.notes: As-needed professional services for economic development consulting including public-private partnership structuring, incentive negotiations, Chapter 380 grant contract negotiations, economic impact reporting, and real estate financial analysis.

contracts.project: Tyre Park Phase II Design
contracts.notes: Professional design services for Phase II plan development, site engineering, environmental services, bidding and negotiations, construction administration and project close-out for Tyre Park redevelopment.

contracts.project: Beltline Floodplain Reclamation Master Plan Update
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for the Beltline Floodplain Reclamation Master Plan Update project.

contracts.project: Tarrant Road at Arbor Creek
contracts.notes: Contract amendment for additional engineering and geotechnical services to support a design change for the Tarrant Road at Arbor Creek project.

contracts.project: Parallel Water Supply Line from Terminal Storage to Camp Wisdom Flow Control Valve
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services contract for feasibility study of the Parallel Water Supply Line from Terminal Storage to Camp Wisdom Flow Control Valve project.

contracts.project: Groundwater Sampling, Analysis, and Reporting (Permit #996-C)
contracts.notes: Engineering services contract for groundwater sampling, analysis, and reporting including contingency for re-sampling if required.

contracts.project: Groundwater Sampling, Analysis, and Reporting
contracts.notes: Engineering Services for Groundwater Sampling, Analysis, and Reporting for permit #996-C covering two years with contingency for re-sampling if required.

contracts.project: Tarrant Road at Arbor Creek Improvements - Contract Amendment for Bridge Design
contracts.notes: Amendment to design contract to change from multiple box culverts to bridge crossing, including additional geotechnical services, hydraulic analysis, bridge detailed design, and TRA permit coordination.

contracts.project: Insurance Service Office (ISO) Survey - Engineering Grading Evaluation and Improvement Recommendations
contracts.notes: Three-phase engineering grading evaluation and improvement recommendations for the City of Grand Prairie's Insurance Service Office (ISO) survey to identify opportunities for improved fire protection ratings.

contracts.project: Grand Prairie Landfill - West Fork Trinity River Erosion Protection Improvements
contracts.notes: Contract amendment for additional engineering services related to the Grand Prairie Landfill erosion protection project to ensure compliance with Texas Parks and Wildlife Department requirements.

contracts.project: TRA Basin 5.0J Sanitary Sewer Evaluation Survey
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for sanitary sewer evaluation survey of TRA Basin 5.0J to assess system condition and capacity.

contracts.project: Great Southwest Parkway Extension from Ave K to Fountain Parkway
contracts.notes: Professional services contract for engineering and construction services for the Great Southwest Parkway Extension project.

contracts.project: ISO Survey - Engineering Grading Evaluation and Improvement Recommendations
contracts.notes: Three-phase engineering grading evaluation and improvement recommendations for the City of Grand Prairie's Insurance Service Office (ISO) survey covering fire department, water department, and 911 communications systems.

contracts.project: Great Southwest Parkway Roadway from Ave K to Fountain Pkwy
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for Great Southwest Parkway roadway improvements including design surveys, construction plans, utility coordination, subsurface utility engineering, geotechnical engineering, and right of way document preparation.

contracts.project: Highway 360 Elevated Service Road Design
contracts.notes: Design costs for Highway 360 Elevated Service Road, to be reimbursed from Tax Increment Financing increment created by the developer's project.

contracts.project: Fiber Optic Master Plan
contracts.notes: Fiber Optic Master Plan (Phase I) and design plans, specifications, and cost estimates (Phase II) for citywide fiber optic infrastructure.

contracts.project: Fiber Optic Master Plan (Phase I) and Design Plans, Specifications, and Cost Estimates (Phase II)
contracts.notes: Development of a Fiber Master Plan evaluating current fiber network condition and needs, followed by preparation of plans, specifications, and cost estimates for prioritized CIP projects. Includes professional construction phase support services.

contracts.project: Day Miar Road from Ragland Road to Prairie Waters Drive
contracts.limits: Ragland Road to Prairie Waters Drive
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services including design drawing and specifications, bid services, and construction phase services for Day Miar Road improvements.

contracts.project: Shady Grove Road Reconstruction from Belt Line Road to Roy Orr Boulevard
contracts.limits: Belt Line Road to Roy Orr Boulevard
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for preliminary survey and alignment study for Shady Grove Road reconstruction.

contracts.project: 13S – 30" Goodland Parkway Waterline Project
contracts.notes: Detailed design services for a 30-inch waterline project along Goodland Parkway.

contracts.project: Performance Wastewater Lift Station Replacement Project
contracts.notes: Engineering and surveying services for replacement of wastewater lift station.

contracts.project: Unidirectional Flushing Program Update Project
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for updating the unidirectional flushing program.

contracts.project: Dedicated Right-Turn Lane at SH-161 Frontage Road and Arkansas Lane Intersection
contracts.limits: Southbound SH-161 Frontage Road and Arkansas Lane intersection
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for a dedicated right-turn lane at the intersection of Southbound SH-161 Frontage Road and Arkansas Lane.

contracts.project: Comprehensive Safety Action Plan - Safe Streets and Roads for All (SS4A) Grant
contracts.notes: Development of a comprehensive safety action plan as part of the Safe Streets and Roads for All Grant program.

contracts.project: Secondary Wildlife Trail Connection at Trinity River Under Entertainment Way
contracts.limits: Trinity River crossing under Entertainment Way
contracts.notes: Professional design services for a secondary Wildlife Trail connection that crosses under Entertainment Way at the Trinity River.

contracts.project: Canoe/Kayak Launch area at Mike Lewis Park
contracts.notes: Professional design and engineering services for construction of a canoe/kayak access point to the Trinity River, pedestrian access, drop-off/loading, staging area, and project signage at Mike Lewis Park.

contracts.project: Heritage Pump Station Chemical Feed Improvements Project
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for design of chloramination booster system with upgraded chemical storage, containment, metering pumps, water quality analyzers, and SCADA controls at Heritage Pump Station to enhance water quality, operational reliability, and regulatory compliance.
